_comment: Canonical machine-readable project status. Single source of truth for the visual dashboard. When status changes: (1) edit this file, (2) run `node scripts/build-dashboard.mjs`, (3) re-publish the Artifact at artifactUrl (from this session: republish build/dashboard.html; from another session: pass url=artifactUrl), (4) mirror the change in START_HERE.md prose. Text fields render as-is (small inline HTML allowed — this is an operator-authored private page).
title: Villa Ops OS — Project Hub
lede: One place for the mission, what's built, where we are, who's next, and what to do next. The at-a-glance view of START_HERE.md.

attention.title: Outreach not started
attention.note: Both assets are "Ready — not contacted." Nothing has been sent.

attention.title: Pre-send verification
attention.note: Re-check OriVista's rebrand-leak facts (E3 / E4) and confirm founder surname before send.

attention.title: Deploy + go-live keys
attention.note: Ship to the chosen domain; set analytics + ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (flips demo agent mock→live).

attention.note: Run capture-evidence.mjs per asset — needs network, so it's an operator step.

attention.note: Entity, invoicing, IP — gates signing any Bali client.

status.label: Public site + assessment funnel + free tools
Live demo agent — "Villa Demo Selena"
status.note: Mock offline; real Claude when key is set

p0.title: Unblock & send
items: Deploy the site + both assets to the domain; set the 4 env vars; turn on analytics.
Clear the legal / contracting path — gates signing a Bali client.
Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to flip the demo agent mock → live.
Ship Gravity Bali: pre-send checklist → capture screenshots → send M1.
Ship OriVista: same checklist. Verify E3 / E4 + Manish's surname before send.

p1.title: This month
items: Build the next audits from the template (Nagisa → Hideaway); 2–4 / week.
Run the sales motion on any reply: qualify → discovery → same-day proposal.
Publish the blog cadence; submit sitemap to Search Console.

p2.title: Compounding
items: Convert the first pilot into a written case study + testimonial.

done30: Done at 30 days = one signed pilot (or a live negotiation) and an inbound engine with ≥4 indexed pages.

offer.sla: SLA: 95% of eligible new enquiries on covered channels get a first automated response within two minutes. 14-day build that augments the client's stack — never replaces the PMS. +$1,500 compliant reviews add-on.

contract: Passive public audit only — nothing submitted, nobody messaged, nothing published without permission. Every finding classified Verified / Observed / Inferred / Not tested. No overpromise — projections are Target / Estimate / Assumption, never guarantees. Never name an owner without public confirmation. No fake success in code — a save is reported only after the backend confirms it.
footer: Full detail, the complete document index, and house rules live in START_HERE.md at the repo root — this page is its at-a-glance companion. Private to Selena Systems.
